text:
D0200A2 Resident Mood Interview - Interest Loss Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident experienced a loss of interest or pleasure in doing things. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
120 D0200B1_FEEL_DOWN_CD D0200B1_FEEL_DOWN_CD D0200B1 Resident Mood Interview - Feel Down Code CHAR 1 The data
